source.configuration: A temporary reference configuration creates the intended one-point carrier because the supplied SPLIT N TAP wrapper evaluates only its placeholder icosphere.

scope: Exact evaluated surface and authored Blender viewport material parity. The procedural filament surface does not slice the asset and is not a G-code toolpath.

geometry.surfaceComparison: Local-space Blender evaluated-mesh export and bidirectional surface comparison.

capture.temporalFilter: Eevee-style Blackman-Harris jitter and linear RGBA16F accumulation
capture.browserCaptureMethod: direct 768x768 WebGL canvas buffer; element screenshots are excluded because host screenshot scaling changes the comparison silhouette
capture.lightScaleInterpretation: Blender Area energy and Three.js RectAreaLight intensity use renderer-specific units. The recorded scales align exposure under the shared normalized rig; they do not claim equal physical power.

recoveredGraph.color: POINT-domain col attribute, constant [0.8,0.8,0.8] on all 2,372 points
recoveredGraph.generatedCoordinates: complete shaded Split n Tap bounds

interpretation: The exact loft, threaded shaft, flange, cap, material assignment, constant POINT col field, Generated-coordinate layer bands, distorted Wave texture, Backfacing branch, and Bump parameters are represented in the browser. Direct evaluated-mesh comparison establishes zero bidirectional surface distance. The temporal resolve aligns mean exposure within 0.0052 and retains strong 0.816 pixel luminance correlation; the remaining local difference is the measured Eevee-versus-WebGL lighting and derivative-filter response.
